name: Mustard Sauce-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend 2 tablespoons of dry mustard, 1 teaspoon of flour, and 1/4 cup of the light cream in a bowl.
2. In a heavy-bottomed pan, heat the remaining 3/4 cup of light cream.
3. Stir in the mustard mixture from step 1.
4. Beat the egg yolk in a small bowl.
5. Add 2 tablespoons of the hot mustard mixture to the beaten egg yolk and stir.
6. Stir the egg yolk sauce into the pan with the heated cream.
7. Gradually add sugar, stirring constantly until thickened.
8. Stir in the heated vinegar and salt to taste.
